key.name: show-total
key.description: When enabled, displays the current workspace as "current / total" (e.g. 2 / 4). When disabled, shows only the current number (e.g. 2).

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Where to display the indicator in the top bar: "left" or "right".

key.name: left-placement
key.description: When placed on the left, whether to appear before or after the Activities button.
